name: Dedup the V0/V1 nav entry-gate across 7 screens into a useEntryGate() hook
description: 7 screens carry `const blocked = MODE_NAV_V1_ENABLED ? !canEnter(route) : isParentProxy`. The V0 arm is redundant — canEnter() (navigation-contract.ts:390-392) already blocks proxy users for non-(home|library|progress) routes under every flag state, so the ternary collapses to `!canEnter(routeKey, params?)`. Approved cut: extract a thin useEntryGate() hook (also closes a missing Sentry breadcrumb — only relearn.tsx has it today). NAV-CONTRACT-SENSITIVE: must not regress any shipped flag state — mandatory flag-matrix test. NOT on the identity DB cutover surface.
acceptanceCriteria: A useEntryGate(routeKey, params?) hook in apps/mobile/src/hooks/ encapsulates the entry-gate predicate (delegating to navigationContract.canEnter) + the Sentry breadcrumb; the 7 screens (dictation/homework/session _layout, mentor-memory, practice, quiz/_layout, topic/relearn) use it instead of the duplicated ternary; behavior IDENTICAL across all three shipped flag states (flags-off, V0-on, V1-on) × proxy/non-proxy — proven by a flag-matrix regress test for at least one learning route; NO internal jest.mock (GC1/GC6) — use the __fixtures__/navigation-matrix pattern.
